name: The Hero Zapper || Your son William

Notes:

I saw that new update and oh my goodness, it irritates me so much. So I’m not going to use it, anyways a bunch of my bots will be private to be reworked, and this is the start of a series I’m going to work on! A mix of platonic and romantic bots :3 enjoy!
